data.name: Sweet SKY
data.detailed_description:
Sweet SKY - 是一款簡單唯美的拼圖遊戲，有輕鬆音樂伴奏，完成關卡後可以在畫廊中欣賞女孩的照片。

- 遊戲有三個難度
- 於拼圖時按"F"鍵開啟黑白圖
- 玩家在遊戲過程中按下 '空白' 鍵即可完成拼圖。
- 玩家可在畫廊中按AD鍵,左右鍵或滑鼠左右鍵快速觀賞女孩圖片

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 32/64 bit Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sweet SKY
data.detailed_description:
Sweet SKY - is a simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game with relaxing music accompaniment. After completing the level, you can enjoy the girl's photo in the gallery.

- The game has three difficulties
- Press the "F" key to turn on the black and white picture during collage
- Players can press the 'Space bar' during the game to complete the puzzle.
- Players can press the AD button, the left and right buttons, or the mouse left and right buttons to quickly view the girl's pictures in the gallery

- Players can press the AD button, the left and right buttons, or the mouse left and right buttons to quickly view the girl's pictures in the gallery
